query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

1.description: get Drammen municipality extent (bbox) and kommunenummer

2.description: fetch 200-year flood polygons within Drammen bbox

3.description: fetch quick-clay hazard polygons within Drammen bbox

4.description: fetch parcels (teig) within Drammen bbox and compute area_m2 > 5000

5.description: keep only parcels that intersect 200-year flood polygons

6.description: find nearest quick-clay hazard for each affected parcel and get distance

7.description: select parcel id, area_m2, and distance to quick-clay
